PreToolUse.command: node -e "console.log('\n⚠️  Git Push 提醒：请确认已完成代码审查和测试\n')"

PostToolUse.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const f='$FILE'; if(fs.existsSync(f) && fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8').includes('console.log')) console.log('\n⚠️  警告: 检测到 console.log，请在提交前移除\n');"

SessionEnd.command: node -e "console.log('\n📝 会话结束，记得保存重要上下文\n')"
